heading: Disclosure of institution privacy policy
label: 6803 Disclosure of institution privacy policy
notes: Amendments2015—Subsec. (f). added subsec. (f).Pub. L. 114–942006— designated concluding provisions of subsec. (a) as (b), inserted heading, substituted “Disclosures required by subsection (a)” for “Such disclosures”, redesignated former subsec. (b) as (c), and added subsecs. (d) and (e).Pub. L. 109–351

children.text: disclosing nonpublic personal information to affiliates and nonaffiliated third parties, consistent with , including the categories of information that may be disclosed;section 6802 of this title
disclosing nonpublic personal information of persons who have ceased to be customers of the financial institution; and
protecting the nonpublic personal information of consumers.

children.heading: Regulations
children.label: b Regulations
children.text: Disclosures required by subsection (a) shall be made in accordance with the regulations prescribed under .section 6804 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: the categories of persons to whom the information is or may be disclosed, other than the persons to whom the information may be provided pursuant to ; andsection 6802(e) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: the policies and practices of the institution with respect to disclosing of nonpublic personal information of persons who have ceased to be customers of the financial institution;
the categories of nonpublic personal information that are collected by the financial institution;
the policies that the institution maintains to protect the confidentiality and security of nonpublic personal information in accordance with ; andsection 6801 of this title
the disclosures required, if any, under .section 1681a(d)(2)(A)(iii) of this title

children.heading: Exemption for certified public accountants
children.label: d Exemption for certified public accountants
A
children.text: a certified public accountant;

children.label: B
children.text: certified or licensed for such purpose by a State; and

children.label: C
children.text: subject to any provision of law, rule, or regulation issued by a legislative or regulatory body of the State, including rules of professional conduct or ethics, that prohibits disclosure of nonpublic personal information without the knowing and expressed consent of the consumer.

children.heading: Limitation
children.label: 2 Limitation
children.text: Nothing in this subsection shall be construed to exempt or otherwise exclude any financial institution that is affiliated or becomes affiliated with a certified public accountant described in paragraph (1) from any provision of this section.

children.heading: Definitions
children.label: 3 Definitions
children.text: For purposes of this subsection, the term “State” means any State or territory of the United States, the District of Columbia, Puerto Rico, Guam, American Samoa, the Trust Territory of the Pacific Islands, the Virgin Islands, or the Northern Mariana Islands.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The agencies referred to in shall jointly develop a model form which may be used, at the option of the financial institution, for the provision of disclosures under this section.section 6804(a)(1) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: be comprehensible to consumers, with a clear format and design;

children.label: B
children.text: provide for clear and conspicuous disclosures;

children.label: C
children.text: enable consumers easily to identify the sharing practices of a financial institution and to compare privacy practices among financial institutions; and

children.label: D
children.text: be succinct, and use an easily readable type font.

children.heading: Timing
children.label: 3 Timing
children.text: A model form required to be developed by this subsection shall be issued in proposed form for public comment not later than 180 days after .October 13, 2006

children.heading: Safe harbor
children.label: 4 Safe harbor
children.text: Any financial institution that elects to provide the model form developed by the agencies under this subsection shall be deemed to be in compliance with the disclosures required under this section.

children.heading: Exception to annual notice requirement
children.label: f Exception to annual notice requirement

children.text: provides nonpublic personal information only in accordance with the provisions of subsection (b)(2) or (e) of or regulations prescribed under , andsection 6802 of this titlesection 6804(b) of this title

has not changed its policies and practices with regard to disclosing nonpublic personal information from the policies and practices that were disclosed in the most recent disclosure sent to consumers in accordance with this section,
